creator: drtr0jan@yandex.ru
text:
I've an Generation 2 Hyper-V virtual machine with Virtual DVD Drive on SCSI 0 ID 1 channel. After successful installation FreeBSD 11.1-BETA1 on disk an error appears on the console every second:
(cd0:strovsc0:0:0:1): storvsc scsi_status = 2
After removing Virtual DVD Drive from VM the error disappears.
